name: Tomato, Caper, Olive, and Blue Cheese Salad
recipeIngredient: 1/3 cup halved pitted Kalamata olives (or plain green olives)
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the tomato slices on a large platter.
2. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar.
3. Drizzle with olive oil.
4. Sprinkle lightly with salt.
5. Sprinkle generously with pepper.
6. Sprinkle with Kalamata olives and crumbled blue cheese.
7. Sprinkle with capers.
8. Garnish with fresh basil leaves.
Serves 6 as a side dish, or 2-3 as main course
